title: SoFi 2026 Stock Forecast and Analyst Consensus
text: The analyst consensus for SoFi Technologies is mixed, with different sources showing varying ratings. 16 analysts covering SoFi Technologies have a consensus rating of Buy and an average price target of $22.94. The consensus rating is Hold, indicating a balanced distribution of views as analysts weigh growth prospects against valuation sensitivity and macroeconomic uncertainty. 31 Wall Street analysts show SOFI has a neutral consensus with a median price target of $27.75, ranging from $12.00 to $38.00, with an overall analyst rating of Buy. Average 12-month SoFi Technologies stock predictions cluster in the mid-$20 range, while individual targets span from $18 to $38. The disparity in ratings reflects divided sentiment about the company's outlook. More constructive views emphasize revenue milestones, deposit growth and forward EBITDA guidance, whereas more cautious perspectives focus on credit-cycle dynamics, loan demand and broader valuation pressures in growth-focused financial stocks. Key factors driving analyst views include SoFi's record revenue growth of 41-43% in Q1 2026, path to profitability with ten consecutive profitable quarters, and platform strategy execution with strong member and product growth.
